name: Halves Sharp pow 2
description: Light power-law tension sharpening (exponent 2). Tension 0.5 drops to 0.25, 0.9 stays at 0.81. First attempt at creating tension peaks.

config.description: Power-law sharpening with exponent 2 applied to tension before learning. sign(t)*|t|^2 compresses mid-range tensions while preserving peaks. Compare inspect weights with Halves Raw to see the difference.
